mapper.sql: id, eaf_detail_id, sys_no, check_rec_id, step_no, check_proc_desc, checker, dept, check_datetime, check_result, check_desc, is_current_step, check_user, checker_string
mapper.update:
update cf_srm_eaf_rec
check_proc_desc = #{eafRecDto.checkProcDesc},
dept = #{eafRecDto.dept},
check_datetime = #{eafRecDto.checkDatetime},
check_result = #{eafRecDto.checkResult},
check_desc = #{eafRecDto.checkDesc},
is_current_step = #{eafRecDto.isCurrentStep},
check_user = #{eafRecDto.checkUser},
where id=#{eafRecDto.id}
mapper.select: select checker_string from cf_srm_eaf_rec where step_no>1 and is_current_step=1 and sys_no=#{baseDto.sysNo} and check_rec_id =#{baseDto.id}

select audit_pass_status as auditPassStatus,audit_nopass_status as auditNopassStatus from cf_srm_eaf_detail where id in (select eaf_detail_id from cf_srm_eaf_rec where sys_no=#{sysNo} and check_rec_id=#{rowId} and is_current_step=1)
select max(step_no) from cf_srm_eaf_rec where sys_no=#{sysNo} and check_rec_id =#{rowId}
select check_result from cf_srm_eaf_rec where sys_no=#{sysNo} and check_rec_id=#{rowId} order by id desc limit 1
